name: boilerplate
description: Boilerplate HTTP API and Next.js app

scripts.test: node scripts/check-test-requirements.mjs && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/management-api
scripts.dev:web-sidecar: npm run build -w @boilerplate/web-sidecar && npm run dev:sidecar -w apps/web
scripts.dev:all: npm run build -w @boilerplate/helpers && sleep 1 && npm run build -w @boilerplate/orm && sleep 1 && npm run build -w @boilerplate/web-sidecar && sleep 1 && concurrently -n api,web-sidecar,web -c blue,cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "sleep 2 && npm run dev:sidecar -w apps/web" "sleep 5 && npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:all:watch: npm run build -w @boilerplate/helpers && sleep 1 && npm run build -w @boilerplate/orm && sleep 1 && npm run build -w @boilerplate/web-sidecar && sleep 1 && concurrently -n helpers,orm,api,web-sidecar,web -c blue,cyan,green,magenta,yellow "npm run build:watch -w @boilerplate/helpers" "sleep 2 && npm run build:watch -w @boilerplate/orm" "sleep 4 && npm run dev:api:watch" "sleep 6 && npm run dev:sidecar:watch -w apps/web" "sleep 8 && npm run dev:web:watch"
